stories.title: NBA execs debate five questions on Knicks-Spurs: W...
stories.summary: Ahead of Wednesday's Game 1 (8:30 p.m. ET on ABC) in San Antonio, Tim Bontemps canvasses the league on the keys to Spurs-Knicks.

stories.title: Experts' picks for Knicks-Spurs, Finals MVP
stories.summary: Who will raise the Larry O'Brien Trophy, the Knicks or Spurs? Our experts make their picks.

stories.title: Brown GM: No Garrett trade if Verse not included
stories.summary: Browns GM Andrew Berry was adamant that he did not seriously consider the Myles Garrett trade with the Rams until Los Angeles included Jared Verse in the deal.

stories.title: Seahawks, Hall reach $42M extension through '29
stories.summary: The Seahawks and edge rusher Derick Hall have agreed to a three-year, $42M extension through the 2029 season that includes $21M guaranteed, his agents told ESPN.

stories.title: Lacy, Toney, Moore lead EA Sports CFB 27 cover
stories.summary: EA Sports College Football 27 will also feature Indiana's Curt Cignetti, USC QB Jayden Maiava, Texas' Colin Simmons and Notre Dame CB Leonard Moore on the cover.
